cleaning_rules.partial_day: impute same building/report_month mean for continuity; excluded from validation
cleaning_rules.placeholder_zeros_2026_06_25_to_2026_06_: keep NA in usage_kwh_clean; fill only in usage_kwh_imputed_continuous
cleaning_rules.known_extreme_outliers: replace with same building/report_month mean excluding bad values
cleaning_rules.suspect_zeros: usage_kwh == 0 while positive month median >=100, replace with same building/report_month mean
cleaning_rules.auto_high_spike: usage > 3 * positive month median OR usage > Q3 + 3 * IQR, replace with same building/report_month mean
